omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We may disclose non-personal data to third parties or allow third parties to collect non-personal data through embedded technology. To deliver ads, third-party advertising companies may place or recognize unique cookies, anonymous identifiers, or similar technology to gather non-personally identifiable information. We use AdMob as our advertising provider in the app.

If you have any concerns or need further information regarding our privacy policy, feel free to email us at okapps2016@gmail.com. We will endeavor to provide clear answers to your questions in a timely manner.
